reportedIssues: Multiple horizontal areas are visibly cut off at the right edge, including the top category tab where “Hot Games” appears as “Hot Ga…” and game cards in the rows below. This makes the page look misaligned or wider than the viewport.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the page content. The lower game cards are partially hidden behind the bottom tab bar.
Carousel arrows on the promotional banner sit very close to the screen edges and appear partially clipped, especially the left arrow.
The top navigation/category row has inconsistent visible content: the search icon tile is fully visible, but later category chips are truncated, making the row feel unfinished.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue describes a Jackpots category being highlighted when it shouldn't be; all reported issues concern layout/visibility problems, not incorrect highlighting state.
